prestazioni: Engine swap to Renault-Nissan HR16DE (H4M) 1.6L naturally aspirated inline-4 (118hp stock) with a forged internals build: Manley forged pistons (8.9:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a custom billet crankshaft by JE Pistons for 8,500 RPM reliability. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe by Milltek Sport, mated to a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control (targeting 1.5 bar / 21.7 psi).

Full standalone ECU conversion using a Link G4+ Xtreme with custom wiring harness by Syvecs, integrating a Bosch Motorsport 0280158003 4-bar MAP sensor and AEM 30-2012 wideband O2 controller. Fuel system upgrade includes a Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors (1000cc/min), and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (FPR) with -6AN feed/return lines. Ignition system features NGK R7437-9 Iridium IX spark plugs gapped at 0.024" and a custom coil-on-plug conversion using Denso Iridium coils (part #5022).

Chassis reinforcement with a custom bolt-in roll cage by Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, 35mm diameter, 2.5mm wall thickness) featuring a 6-point harness bar and integrated strut tower braces. Suspension overhaul includes Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for Sandero RS chassis), SuperPro polyurethane bushings (full kit: control arms, subframe, sway bar), and a Whiteline 24mm adjustable rear sway bar. Braking system features Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (front) with 330mm slotted rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a custom brake bias valve by Tilton Engineering for track use.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Pandem widebody kit (Sandero RS-specific, bolt-on fenders with 50mm flares) paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter by Seibon Carbon and a 3-piece adjustable rear wing by APR Performance (GT-250 model, 1,200mm width, 300mm chord). Underbody aero includes a custom diffuser by Maxton Design with integrated LED brake light strip and a front lip splitter extension by Varis Japan (carbon fiber, 3-piece).

Custom 18x9.5" ET15 forged wheels by Work Emotion CR Kiwami (matte bronze finish, 5x108 PCD) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 265/35/18 rear). Wheel spacers by H&R (15mm front, 20mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment. Fender vents by Ventus Performance (carbon fiber, 3-piece) with integrated LED turn signals and heat extraction ducts for the front brakes.

Full interior overhaul with Recaro SPG XL bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) mounted on custom Bride seat rails, paired with a MOMO Mod.70 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede) and a NRG Innovations quick-release hub. Custom roll cage padding by Sparco (fire-retardant, 10mm thickness) and a full Alcantara headliner by Katzkin. Exterior lighting includes LUX H8 V4 LED headlights with custom HID projectors (35W, 6000K) and a custom sequential LED taillight conversion by Diode Dynamics, integrated into the OEM housing.
